text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At a local hospital, Mejiro Ardan and Yaeno
Muteki are performing in a play sponsored by
Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Girl on Crutches
text_block_list.text: Wooow! Are you gonna be Cinderella today?!

text_block_list.name: Girl on Crutches
text_block_list.text: I can't do it right now but... I love dancing! I can't wait to see Cinderella's big dance scene!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, please do look forward to it. I shall
endeavor to do the part justice.

text_block_list.name: Director Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ardaaan, we're starting soooon!

text_block_list.name: Director Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes... the perfect balance of beauty and
grace. You two were born to play Cinderella and
the prince!
choice_data_list: I agree! You both look fantastic!
I agree! You both look fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Director Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes... Oh, and Ardan, please don't change
into these glass slippers until just before you go
on stage.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Understood. It would be a terrible shame if one
were to crack all of a sudden.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan takes a good look at the glass
slippers placed at her feet.

text_block_list.name: Director Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yes, they're perfectly safe! As I explained earlier,
we've reworked the slipper scenes so Cinderella
won't have to move much at all!

text_block_list.name: Director Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Like in the ball scene, rather than taking up the
prince's invitation to dance, Cinderella declines
with a dignified "no, thank you!"

text_block_list.name: Director Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame that we had to cut the dance scene,
but we can't have any actors getting injured!
choice_data_list: All right... Don't push yourself too hard, okay?
All right... Don't push yourself too hard, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...You can trust me. Even if I'm to attend a ball in
a pair of glass slippers...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I can think of nobody more suited to keeping
those slippers intact than myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The show proceeds without a hitch... and
eventually, the ballroom scene begins...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
May I have the honor of a dance with a beautiful
lady?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, you may.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cinderella dances with featherlight footwork.
Even as she dances in glass slippers that could
break at any second, her graceful smile never
leaves her face.

text_block_list.name: Director Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... I'm amazed that she's pulling off those
graceful, flowing movements without firmly
planting her feet. That's incredibly difficult.

text_block_list.name: Director Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Most would be gritting their teeth... but she's
smiling from ear to ear.

text_block_list.name: Girl on Crutches
text_block_list.text: Wowww! Her dancing is so, so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Girl on Crutches
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I'll be able to dance again someday... I
really wanna!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ardan! If we dance any longer—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Apologies, Princess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki seizes the perfect moment and
swiftly sweeps Mejiro Ardan off her feet. The
curtain falls with Mejiro Ardan in Yaeno Muteki's
arms and the glass slippers in perfect condition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I must apologize. To the cast and the crew, to
Yaeno, and also to you, Trainer. I went brazenly
off-script during the performance.

text_block_list.name: Director Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I don't mind at all! No one got hurt and the
show was captivating... But I'm curious...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I wished to be a beacon of hope... for the children
who are stuck in their sickbeds.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I hoped to show them the courage needed to take
that first step... rather than the sight of a young
girl shrinking away as she clutches her fragile
glass slippers.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I thought... that would be the best thing I could
do for them right now.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Verily. The fighting spirit I sensed in you during
that performance... was the very same spirit you
display when you race.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Beautiful, noble, and above all else, fierce. Thus... I wished to aid you, however I could, in your display of courage.
choice_data_list: It really was a radiant dance.
Please discuss things with me first in the future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...! Am I deserving of such praise?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I apologize. I assumed I would be admonished for
my behavior.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: So to hear that from you... I—

text_block_list.name: Girl on Crutches
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Cinderella! There you are! Your dance was amazing! And I wanted to thank you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You... came all the way from your room to find
me? Hehe, I'm hardly one to talk, but that's rather
audacious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your kind words. If I contributed in
some way to your standing on your own once
again, then I'm content.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Mejiro Ardan has really given her the
energy and courage to take that first step.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I'm still worried she'll end up hurting herself...
I decide to remind her that she really must be
more careful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Understood.
choice_data_list: That way, we can figure things out together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...! Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm truly sorry... Yes, I should have known you'd
say that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I should have simply consulted with you
beforehand rather than assuming I'd be taken to
task... I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I am truly sorry... And... I am grateful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...If another such opportunity arises, please offer
your input. I shall seek your counsel before
anyone else's.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see two sides to Mejiro Ardan—the one that
calmly owns up to her mistake and apologizes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the one whose intense enthusiasm drives her
to dive in with no regard for what might happen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That combination of prudence and intensity is her
weakness, but perhaps it's part of her charm, too.
